title: Donut smp money display mod
description: all you have to do is do /api and the mod will start working
body:
Shows every nearby player's DonutSMP balance floating above their head
Fetches balances from DonutSMP's API automatically
Color codes them: 🔴 Red = 10B+, 🟡 Gold = 1B+, 🟢 Green = under 1B
just do /api and it will start working(you might have to relog)
